hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(git[[:space:]]+commit|gh[[:space:]]+pr[[:space:]]+create)'; then current_user=$(git config user.name 2>/dev/null); if [ "$current_user" != "mav-claude-bot" ]; then git-as-bot; fi; fi
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -q '\.claude/skills/' && python3 scripts/sync-readme-skills.py; } 2>/dev/null || true
